name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR51Her2HighRisk
title: Select HER2-positive neoadjuvant regimen — Offer trastuzumab-based neoadjuvant therapy for high-risk HER2-positive disease
description: Choose anti-HER2-based neoadjuvant therapy for HER2-positive disease.

action.description: Offer anthracycline and taxane or non-anthracycline regimen in combination with trastuzumab for node-positive or high-risk node-negative HER2-positive disease.
action.title: Offer trastuzumab-based neoadjuvant therapy for high-risk HER2-positive disease

action.description: Pertuzumab may be used with trastuzumab in the neoadjuvant setting for HER2-positive disease.
action.title: Consider pertuzumab with trastuzumab

action.description: Choose anti-HER2-based neoadjuvant therapy for HER2-positive disease.

documentation.citation: Offer trastuzumab-based neoadjuvant therapy for node-positive or high-risk node-negative HER2-positive disease, and pertuzumab may be added with trastuzumab. Evidence: korde-et-al-2021-neoadjuvant-chemotherapy-endocrine-therapy-and-targeted-therapy-for-breast-cancer-asco-guideline_pdf: The Bottom Line, Recommendation 5.1

action.title: Select HER2-positive neoadjuvant regimen — Offer trastuzumab-based neoadjuvant therapy for high-risk HER2-positive disease
